property.label: Display Icon
property.name: selectedIcon
property.description: Use this field to change the icon being displayed

property.label: Display Title
property.name: componentTitle
property.description: Set the title for display on the component

property.label: Display View Count
property.name: displayViewCount
property.description: If you have configured your custom settings to store views you can also display the view count on the component

property.label: Display Like Count
property.name: displayLikeCount
property.description: If you have configured your custom settings to store a like count you can also display the count on the component, setting this as true will also control displaying the like icon
